project.name: MissionChief Map Command Toolkit
project.tagline: Operational map command and mission-window intelligence suite for MissionChief.
project.description: A configurable userscript that turns MissionChief into an operational command centre with the Operational Window Suite, live requirements intelligence, fleet monitoring, guarded transport, map utilities, financial reconciliation, responsive layouts and verified release automation.
project.author: Conroy1988

featureCategories.name: Mission command
featureCategories.description: Prioritise incidents, understand mission state and act without losing map context.

features.name: Mission Age Watch
features.summary: Tracks personal and alliance missions by age, ownership, category, severity, distance and clearing state.

features.name: Critical View
features.summary: Concentrates missions requiring immediate attention into a focused workflow.

features.name: Mission Inspector
features.summary: Opens deeper operational context only when requested.

features.name: Mission Value
features.summary: Displays verified mission value inside opened MissionChief windows without obstructing native controls.

features.name: Major Incident Feed
features.summary: Provides a high-priority incident feed with quick map navigation.

featureCategories.name: Operational Window Suite
featureCategories.description: Coordinate requirements, mission-window intelligence, mission-list priority and guarded transport through one lifecycle.

features.name: Enhanced Operational Requirements
features.summary: Reconciles authoritative vehicle, equipment, personnel, capacity, selected, en-route, on-scene and still-needed demand without inventing coverage.
details: Positive parsed evidence is required before covered demand is displayed in green
Amber waiting and unresolved states preserve uncertainty
Native, grouped and compatible hidden LSSM sources are scored and rebound
Qualified personnel, patient demand, trailers and capacity factors retain reviewed evidence boundaries

features.name: Extended Call Window
features.summary: Adds typed mission-window intelligence without creating a second mission-window lifecycle.
details: Generation, alarm, keyword and map-centre context

features.name: Extended Mission List
features.summary: Prioritises the live mission list with deterministic state across MissionChief refreshes.
details: Patient, prisoner, credit and time badges

features.name: Enhanced Transport Requests
features.summary: Provides opt-in transport assistance through strict route and candidate safety checks.

featureCategories.name: Fleet and transport
featureCategories.description: See vehicle state, transport demand and operational gaps at a glance.

features.name: Vehicle Code Status
features.summary: Summarises vehicle status codes, descriptions and counts.

features.name: Transport Watcher
features.summary: Highlights missions still requiring patient or prisoner transport.

features.name: Patient Transport Sweep
features.summary: Manually releases eligible alliance ambulances sequentially while excluding the signed-in player's own vehicles.
details: One verified vehicle at a time

features.name: Resource Gap
features.summary: Compares mission demand with available personal vehicle context inside a selected radius.

features.name: Auto-load all vehicles
features.summary: Uses MissionChief's native hidden-vehicle batch control inside the active mission window.

featureCategories.name: Map operations
featureCategories.description: Make the map faster to read, easier to navigate and more useful during busy sessions.

features.name: Coverage Heat Map
features.summary: Visualises operational coverage directly on the MissionChief map.

features.name: Smart Bookmark Labels
features.summary: Creates compact place labels while preserving access to the complete location name.

features.name: Coverage rings and map overlays
features.summary: Adds geographic context, visibility controls and presentation options around the map.

featureCategories.name: Finance and presentation
featureCategories.description: Make alliance income, mission completion and payout events easy to understand.

features.name: Alliance Credits
features.summary: Shows alliance mission values with eligibility-aware states and value filters.

features.name: Financial intelligence
features.summary: Reconciles income, spending, net position and variance with Discord-ready reporting.
details: Daily, weekly, monthly and custom periods

features.name: Payout presentations
features.summary: Displays themed mission-completion banners with optional sound and emergency flash.

featureCategories.name: Responsive operation
featureCategories.description: Use the same Toolkit state across Desktop, Tablet/iPad and iOS layouts.

features.name: Desktop, Tablet and iOS Mobile Mode
features.summary: Purpose-built layouts for full desktop maps, landscape tablets and Safari on iOS.

features.name: Economy Mode
features.summary: Suppresses non-essential presentation overhead while retaining operational controls and state.

features.name: Settings import and export
features.summary: Moves Toolkit configuration between devices and operating modes.

featureCategories.name: Release assurance
featureCategories.description: Know which version is installed and how the public release is verified.

features.name: Live Version Status
features.summary: Shows LATEST or UPDATE as a single-line map control with manual rechecking.

themes.name: Cyberpunk
themes.description: Neon cyan, warning-yellow and magenta telemetry.

themes.name: Fallout 4

themes.name: Umbrella

themes.name: Factorio
themes.description: Industrial controls, amber machinery and mechanical status panels.

themes.name: 007 Intelligence
themes.description: Classified dossiers, gun-barrel geometry and champagne-gold controls.

themes.name: Hyrule Command

shortcuts.action: Open or close Vehicle Code Status

modes.name: Desktop
modes.summary: Full map workspace with complete command panels.
modes.bestFor: Large displays, mouse and keyboard operation, multi-panel monitoring.

modes.name: Tablet
modes.summary: Landscape-optimised touch controls fitted to available map space.
modes.bestFor: iPad and tablet operation with readable persistent controls.

modes.name: iOS Mobile
modes.summary: Safe-area-aware Safari layout with mobile controls and viewport recovery.
modes.bestFor: MissionChief operation from iPhone with minimal map obstruction.

sections.heading: Install through Greasy Fork
sections.body: Install Tampermonkey or a compatible userscript manager, open the Toolkit installation link, review permissions and confirm installation. Greasy Fork remains the supported automatic-update channel.

sections.heading: First launch
sections.body: Open MissionChief and use the map command button. Core controls load first; larger panels and monitors are constructed only when required.

sections.heading: Persistent controls
sections.body: Feature state, theme, operating mode and toolbar state are retained. Export settings before substantial browser or device changes.

sections.heading: Map-first behaviour
sections.body: The Toolkit adds summaries, overlays and shortcuts around MissionChief rather than replacing its native workflows.

sections.heading: Four coordinated operational families
sections.body: The suite combines Enhanced Operational Requirements, Extended Call Window, Extended Mission List and opt-in Enhanced Transport Requests under one versioned settings model and lifecycle coordinator.

sections.heading: Requirement truth states
sections.body: Green coverage requires positive parsed evidence and every known row to be satisfied. Amber waiting means usable evidence has not arrived; amber unresolved means evidence cannot be classified safely.

sections.heading: MissionChief and LSSM coexistence
sections.body: The Toolkit evaluates active native, grouped and compatible hidden LSSM sources, rebinds when authority changes and suppresses matching output when a visible equivalent LSSM panel is active.

sections.heading: Guarded transport
sections.body: Enhanced Transport Requests remains opt-in and validates the exact route, candidate visibility, candidate enablement, ambiguity and duplicate-action state.

sections.heading: Mission Age Watch
sections.body: Filter and sort personal and alliance missions by age, ownership, category, operational state and distance origin, then zoom or open a mission directly.

sections.heading: Critical View and Mission Inspector
sections.body: Critical View concentrates urgent work; Mission Inspector provides deeper on-demand context.

sections.heading: Mission Value
sections.body: Mission Value displays a verified value, hides unavailable values and stays clear of native controls.

sections.heading: Transport Watcher
sections.body: Transport Watcher identifies patient or prisoner transport-required missions.

sections.heading: Patient Transport Sweep
sections.body: The manual bounded alliance workflow excludes the signed-in player's vehicles and processes one verified eligible ambulance at a time.

sections.heading: Resource Gap
sections.body: Compares mission demand with personal vehicle context inside a configurable radius.

sections.heading: Coverage tools
sections.body: Coverage Heat Map and rings provide geographic context; high-cost overlays should be enabled only when useful.

sections.heading: Smart Bookmark Labels
sections.body: Automatically shortens labels while retaining the full name through tooltips or touch previews.

sections.heading: Financial intelligence
sections.body: Reconciles income, spending and variance and can send configured summaries to a saved Discord webhook.

sections.heading: Import and export
sections.body: Move configuration between Desktop, Tablet and iOS. Exports may contain a saved Discord webhook and must remain private.

sections.heading: Reset strategy
sections.body: Export first, reset only the affected feature where possible and test with the default Map Command interface before a full reset.

troubleshooting.problem: MissionChief feels slow immediately after page load
steps: Confirm the installed version is current
Compare with the Toolkit disabled and capture startup metrics

troubleshooting.problem: A button or panel is missing
steps: Check whether the toolbar is collapsed
Report browser, userscript manager and Toolkit versions
Allow the mission window to finish loading
Check whether MissionChief exposes requirement evidence
Check for an equivalent visible LSSM panel
Report the exact mission and unresolved wording rather than assuming coverage

troubleshooting.problem: Settings did not carry to another device

knownIssues.title: No release-blocking issue is recorded for the current verified release
knownIssues.body: Release channels and integrity state remain visible on the status page and in GitHub.

knownIssues.title: MissionChief interface changes can affect selectors
knownIssues.body: A live MissionChief markup change may require a userscript update even where static selector contracts remain green.

knownIssues.title: Large overlays have a deliberate performance cost
knownIssues.body: Coverage and monitoring systems should be enabled when operationally useful rather than left active on low-power devices.

mediaRoadmap: Mission Value inside a native mission window
